subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 141014781 is not a GRB
body:
George Younes (USRA/NASA-MSFC) report on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 141014781 at 18:45:09.85 UT
on 14 October 2014, which resulted in an Autonomous Repoint Request (ARR),
tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger
is due to a solar flare."
